temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) In a dark, wet city street at night, a vintage gold-colored Rolls-Royce is parked. Two men stand beside it. Suddenly, a police car with flashing blue lights speeds into the frame from the left, its sirens blaring loudly. The men by the car turn and run away in panic as the police car screeches to a halt, its bright headlights illuminating the wet pavement. (Storyline: This opening scene immediately establishes a high-stakes situation, introducing a conflict between the two men and the police. The arrival of the police car creates a sense of urgency and danger.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, continuous police siren dominates the audio, accompanied by the sound of screeching tires.)
